Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Each line seems to have Timestamp like 2024 12 11T08 59 50 000Z Then an action type FOCUS TYPING SAVE SWITCH CLICK SCROLL HIGHLIGHT CLOSE Then App Then Window

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For each of these I need to create an event with Case ID Activity Name Timestamp

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Looking at the actions and applications Multiple FOCUS with Microsoft Word Quarterly Report docx and Document1 docx Then TYPING with Microsoft Word Document1 docx Then SAVE with Microsoft Word Document1 docx Then SWITCH involving Google Chrome and Email Inbox Then CLICK SCROLL CLICK in Email Inbox Then HIGHLIGHT in Acrobat Then FOCUS TYPING SAVE in Excel Budget Then SWITCH back to Word Then TYPING SAVE CLOSE in Word Document1 Then FOCUS TYPING SAVE CLOSE in Word Quarterly Report

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: So the cases could be Case 1 Working with Microsoft Word documents Case 2 Working with Email via Google Chrome Case 3 Working with Excel budget

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This looks like a logical flow starting with Word operations on reports then switching to Chrome Email then moving to Excel budget operations then back to Word document operations and finally Word quarterly report

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Let me verify Case 1 Word events yes all have App Microsoft Word Case 2 Chrome Email yes all have Window Email Inbox and involve Chrome Case 3 Excel Budget yes all have Window Budget 2024 xlsx and involve Excel

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Problem events 15 to 21 are in both Case 1 and Case 7 in this split No in this definition Case 1 is only 1 to 4 Case 7 is 15 to 21 so no overlap

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: To avoid overlap perhaps Case 1 events 1 to 4 only Case 2 event 5 Case 3 events 6 to 9 Case 4 event 10 Case 5 events 11 to 13 Case 6 event 14 Case 7 events 15 to 21

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Now no overlap Case 1 1 to 4 Case 2 5 Case 3 6 to 9 Case 4 10 Case 5 11 to 13 Case 6 14 Case 7 15 to 21

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Since no mapping is provided I think for this transformation I should output the Activity Name as the raw action as that is what is given

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So first event Case ID 1 Activity Name FOCUS Timestamp 2024 12 11T08 59 50 000Z Second event Case ID 1 Activity Name FOCUS Timestamp 2024 12 11T09 00 00 000Z and so on

Name: Validation - IND
Text: I think this meets the requirements Data Transformation converted raw log to event log format Case Identification grouped related events into cases Event Attributes included Case ID Activity Name Timestamp
